areasReviewed: denial of service and memory bounds

findings.evidence: is_query_view accepts any block containing one trimmed line that starts with "{{query" and ends with "}}" plus any separate trimmed "tine.view:: table" or "tine.view:: board" line; it does not parse the block grammar.
findings.impact: An unusual or adversarially constructed focused block could be classified as a query view and receive the filter line. Exploitation still requires the user to invoke the command while that block is focused, and the host validates block identity and expected text.
findings.title: Broad textual recognition of query-view blocks

findings.evidence: The SDK caps messages at 256 KiB and tine_alloc returns address 0 for larger requests. The WebAssembly memory is bounded at 16 MiB, and the artifact imports no capabilities beyond memory.
findings.impact: A malformed host event or incorrect host handling of allocation failure could trap or stop this plugin instance, causing localized denial of service, but does not expose graph data or grant additional access.
findings.title: Oversized input can terminate the plugin instance

findings.evidence: Cargo.lock pins registry dependencies by checksum and the SDK by an exact Git revision; no build.rs or other build scripts are present. The deterministic report states the artifact was built from commit 733aabdfb905bbe7c75877878e79ea03aa6de53e with no build network or credentials.
findings.impact: The reviewed build has reproducible provenance and no evident build-time execution beyond standard Rust dependency compilation.
findings.title: Dependency and build risk is limited

aiReview.summary: The plugin is narrowly scoped, source and manifest behavior align, and the deterministic report ties the reviewed checkout to a capability-limited WebAssembly artifact importing only host memory. It registers one explicit command and emits a conflict-checked replacement only for blocks containing query and table/board markers. No malicious intent, covert channel, protocol abuse, build script, or unsupported privilege was found.

manualApproval.note: Reviewed the focused-block-only expected-text write. The remaining textual query check is user-invoked, localized, reversible, and cannot target another block.
